title: Just a Rotten Flesh Charcoal
description: Cook or Smelt Rotten Fleshes to Get Charcoals!
body:
Running Out of Coals in Cave? Say No More Worry!
Here's a Simple Datapack That Allows You to Cook or Smelt Rotten Fleshes to Get Charcoals!


Should support older versions of Minecraft, not sure, you can try.
